title: Fire Escape 火灾逃生
scene: 发生火灾，Tom和妈妈迅速从家里撤离。

lines.en: Tom, wake up! There is a fire in the kitchen!
What? I smell smoke! What should we do?
lines.zh: 什么？我闻到烟味了！我们该怎么办？

lines.en: Stay low and crawl to the door. The smoke rises up.
lines.zh: 弯下腰，爬到门口。烟是往上飘的。

lines.en: OK, I am crawling. Should I take my toys?
lines.zh: 好的，我在爬。我要带上我的玩具吗？

lines.en: No! Just follow me. Do not go back for anything.
lines.zh: 不要！跟着我走。不要回头拿任何东西。

lines.en: The door handle is hot! Can we open it?
lines.zh: 门把手很烫！我们能开门吗？

lines.en: Touch it with the back of your hand first.
It is not too hot. I think it is safe.
lines.zh: 不是太烫。应该是安全的。

lines.en: Good. Go outside and call one-one-nine!
I will run to our neighbor's house. Be careful, Mom!
